transport.environment_policy: native runtime allowlist; no provider API keys inherited

paraphrased_evidence.A: A coherent persuasive sequence uses concrete scenarios and recurring metaphors, but repeated assurances, commands, comparisons, and recap points greatly outlast their rhetorical value.
paraphrased_evidence.B: Locally readable sentences and concrete details are arranged without causal or chronological continuity; topics run backward and collide, while the final return to introductory furniture makes the chapter feel corrupted rather than concluded.

parsed.generic_mechanism: Ordered escalation lets each claim prepare the next, whereas disrupted sequencing removes context, reverses development, and prevents both cumulative persuasion and a purposeful landing.
